determine the total Medicare 
payments for acute hospitalizations for the beneficiary, this field must be added to the total Medicare 
payment amount for acute inpatient hospitalizations. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ACUTE_PERDIEM_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This variable was new in 2010; it will always be null/missing in earlier files. 

ACUTE_MDCR_PMT must be added to this field to obtain the total Medicare payments for the year. 

Acute
